title: Newly Renovated Four-Bedroom Garden Villa with a 15-Metre Pool
blurb: A newly renovated four-bedroom retreat at the quiet end of a Seminyak lane — open-plan Balinese-modern living over two floors, a 15-metre pool set in a landscaped garden, generous indoor and outdoor lounges, and a chef on request, five minutes' walk from the beach.
detail:
Set behind a walled garden on a 900 m² plot, this two-storey villa opens onto sprawling open-plan spaces where earthy Balinese materials meet clean modern lines. The ground floor holds an indoor sitting room beside a dining table for ten, a fully equipped kitchen, and a covered al-fresco lounge that steps straight down to the water; one en-suite bedroom sits on this level. Three further bedrooms, including the master, occupy the floor above. All four rooms are en-suite and unusually spacious, ranging from roughly 25 to 44 m², with king or convertible twin beds, balconies, and garden and pool views.

The 15-metre pool runs the length of the garden, lined with six sun loungers and two umbrellas, with a shallow, safe depth that suits children as well as long afternoons with a book. The landscaped lawn doubles as a space for morning yoga, and the indoor living area is fitted with a smart TV, streaming, and a full sound system for slower evenings. In-villa treatments and yoga sessions can be arranged.

Daily breakfast, housekeeping, and a resident team of villa manager, service staff, and security are included, with a private chef available on request to cook Western, Indonesian, and Asian menus. The location balances calm and access: tucked at the end of a peaceful lane yet a five-minute stroll to the sand and minutes from Seminyak's best-known restaurants and beach clubs.

features.l: Dining for ten · chef on request
